prompt:
[character description] = [reference avatar]
[Input Items]
1:1 = 1:1 / 4:5 / 9:16
{X user ID} = @your_account
BREAK THE TIMELINE = BREAK THE TIMELINE

[Main Text]
Use {reference avatar} as the same character. Maintain facial features, hairstyle, hair color, body type, costume, color, and atmosphere, and do not make them a different person. The expression should not be a smile, but a sharp, rebellious, and determined expression with the corners of the mouth not raised, lips tightly closed, and eyebrows slightly furrowed.
Cinematic digital art with {aspect ratio}. The background is an X (Twitter) light mode-style timeline UI based on bright white. Instead of the smartphone itself, the UI screen itself spreads across the entire canvas in a full bleed. Do not show the outer smartphone frame, black bezel, or the edge of the device.
At the top is a white header, a central black X mark, and a two-tab navigation. In the background, post cards, profile round icons, and reply, repost, like, view count, and share icons are lined up, appearing as a sophisticated and minimal X timeline. The post text is processed with light gray dummy text lines, and only "{X user ID}" is clearly displayed in a prominent post card or profile line.
{reference avatar} physically punches through the X timeline screen from the inside, breaking through the cracked transparent screen and UI layer and jumping forward. A dynamic destruction pose with one fist thrust strongly towards the camera, the other arm pulled back, and the upper body twisted. Give strong movement to the fist, shoulders, hair, and costume, emphasizing the tension and power of the moment of breakthrough.
The timeline itself is being destroyed. Post cards are divided by cracks, each UI icon is distorted along the cracks, and white UI panels are peeling off as thin layers and scattering in the depth direction. Transparent glass shards, white UI shards, thin light cracks, and shockwaves scatter towards the camera. However, the avatar's face is clearly visible.
Place "{main text}" largely in the center to lower part of the front of the screen. Design it not just as text, but as a main title logo for a high-end advertising poster. An advertising font style that is vertical and powerful like bold condensed sans-serif, Druk, Bebas Neue, Anton, or DIN Condensed. Add white to silver three-dimensional bevels, black inner shadows, thin gray drop shadows, sharp edges, glassy cracks, transparent fragments, rim lights, and slight shockwave distortions. The characters are accurately spelled, clear and easy to read, and not buried in the UI or fragments.
The whole thing has bright and clean lighting. Based on white, black, light gray, and silver, add modest blue or cyan accents. A high-quality finish with high-end cinematic advertising visuals, sharp details, and a dynamic composition with depth. While maintaining the design of the reference avatar, create a high-quality finish with a sense of three-dimensionality and power.

[Prohibitions]
Smile, happy expression, cute idol style, making them a different person, costume change, multiple characters, body/finger breakdown, face hidden, SNS UI other than X, Instagram style, TikTok style, YouTube style, Facebook style, blue Twitter bird logo, smartphone device body, black bezel, black frame, dark background, cheap-looking characters, round characters, pop characters, characters without effects, garbled text, spelling errors, extra characters, account names other than the specified ID, lack of destruction, no glass shards, no UI destruction, flat, low quality, blurred, blood, wounds, horror expression.
